features: 【UK Brand】– Born in the UK and built on trust, we believe a great product is just the beginning. A digital clock thoughtfully designed, carefully tested, and backed by a team that’s here for the long run not just the sale. With responsive local support and a commitment to lasting quality, we’re here to make sure your experience stays seamless, day after day, year after year.

【Clear, Intelligent Display】– A large LCD screen shows time, date, alarm, and temperature all in one bold glance. Automatic light sensing adjusts brightness, and the optional night light adds soft visibility. Everything you need is right where you want it making timekeeping effortless, intuitive, and frustration free.

【Minimal Meets Modern】– With its clean lines and modern design, this clock blends seamlessly into any space whether it’s resting on an office desk, kitchen shelf, in a care environment or a bedside clock. The clutter free display is easy to read at a glance, offering everyday clarity and calm that suits any room, any style, and any age.

【Premium Build】– Built with precision components and a matte finish that feels as good as it looks. The high contrast LCD display ensures sharp visibility from any distance. Thoughtfully engineered for quiet reliability giving you a product that looks refined, performs consistently, and lasts.

【Simple Setup, No Cables】– Battery-powered for total flexibility. Designed to eliminate clutter and cords, allowing for a fast, clean fit into any environment. Setup takes just minutes, so you can get it in place, switch it on, and get back to the things that matter most. description: Product Description Why Choose Us? Based in the UK , our team focuses on creating reliable, high-quality digital clocks. Designed with a modern aesthetic , this clock fits seamlessly into bedrooms, offices, or bedside tables. The large LCD screen clearly shows the time , date , temperature , and alarm status for easy viewing. A built-in light sensor adjusts the backlight based on ambient lighting , and you can choose between 12- or 24-hour time formats. Additional features include a soft night light , weekday or daily alarm settings, and a snooze function. Bold Numbers, Smart Sensors, Simple Setup This Digital Alarm Clock comes with large Display Digital Clock , Nice large digital numbers display time, temperature, date, day, alarm time with clear and comfortable visual sense. Weekday or everyday alarm, day automatically match. LED Display-With large screen, this smart alarm clock clearly displays time (12/24), calendar (MM/DD), temperature and alarm status (ON/OFF). Clear boldface number display is easy to read. Light Sensor- With built-in smart light sensor, LCD backlight turns on automatically for night-time viewing when the room becomes dark. It won;t disturb you sleep at all. Snooze Function- This alarm clock will softly wake you up from dreams with gradually stronger alarm sound. Equipped with special designed snooze function, it will ring again 5 minutes later when you turn it down. Easy to Set- Easy control buttons with specific names can set time, alarm clock, date, hours display and light sensing control. Large button to stop the alarm on the top. Kids, seniors and the elderly can easily operate it.Ideal for kids, students, adults and senior. How to set the time: Push the button to the desired time position. Then press the hour,minute button to set the time. After setting the time, push the button back to the lock mold. How to set the date: Push the button to the date position. Then press the year, month and day button to set the date. After setting the date, push the button back to the lock mold. How to set the alarm clock: Push the button to the alarm clock position. Press the hour, seconds button and set the alarm time. After setting the alarm time, push the button back to the lock mold.
